title: 第十四届北京市大学生建筑结构设计竞赛
titleEn: 14th Beijing University Student Architectural Structure Design Competition
project: 跨学科大型公共建筑项目，进行结构选型，参数化结构建模，施工验算。
projectEn: An interdisciplinary large-scale public building project involving structural system selection, parametric structural modeling, and construction verification.
contribution: 统筹安排项目进展，结构选型与参数化建模程序，结构初步验算程序
contributionEn: Coordinated project progress, developed the structural selection and parametric modeling workflow, and prepared preliminary structural verification procedures.

title: 2025 年UAD 全国大学生城市设计大赛
titleEn: 2025 UAD National University Student Urban Design Competition
project: 通过算法生成构筑，是空间句法和羊毛算法在城市设计中的运用
projectEn: An algorithm-driven urban design proposal applying space syntax and wool-thread algorithm logic to spatial generation.
contribution: 选址前期分析与方案设计，参数化建模，空间句法路径生成
contributionEn: Led early-stage site analysis and scheme design, parametric modeling, and space-syntax-based path generation.

title: 创盟国际建筑设计有限公司实习
titleEn: Internship at Chuangmeng International Architectural Design Co., Ltd.
project: 跨学科大型公共建筑项目，进行结构选型，参数化结构建模，施工验算。
projectEn: Participated in an interdisciplinary large-scale public building project involving structural system selection, parametric structural modeling, and construction verification.
contribution: 参数化建模，项目图纸核查，机械臂建造仿真
contributionEn: Worked on parametric modeling, drawing review, and robotic construction simulation.

title: 学校大创中心改造工程项目
contribution: 参数化建模，项目图纸核查，机械臂建造仿真
contributionEn: Responsible for parametric modeling, drawing review, and robotic construction simulation.

title: CDAC 同济大学工作营：空中机器人离散型壳体自主无人倾斜砌筑
titleEn: CDAC Tongji University Workshop: Autonomous Unmanned Inclined Masonry of Discrete Shells Using Aerial Robots
project: 通过无人机识别各模块二维码，实现定位抓取，实现模块倾斜砌筑。
projectEn: Used UAV-based QR-code recognition to locate, grasp, and assemble modules for inclined masonry construction.
contribution: 模块组装与制作，无人机应用场景设计
contributionEn: Contributed to module assembly and fabrication, as well as UAV application scenario design.

title: 2024 年“挑战杯”首都大学生创业计划竞赛
titleEn: 2024 Challenge Cup Capital University Student Entrepreneurship Plan Competition
project: 针对张镇乡村文化传播困难，传播路径单一的问题，团队实地下乡调研，与当地负责人沟通，了解文化特色和需求。通过文创制作，墙绘宣传，美育教育等方式，提升当地文化影响力。
projectEn: The team conducted field research in Zhang Town to address limited rural cultural communication channels, communicating with local stakeholders to understand cultural characteristics and needs. Cultural creative products, mural publicity, and aesthetic education activities were used to enhance local cultural influence.
contribution: 独立完成宣传册制作，下乡实地调研，宣传视频制作
contributionEn: Independently completed brochure production, field research, and promotional video production.

title: 高等院校第六届/ 第七届绿色建筑技能大赛
titleEn: 6th / 7th Green Building Skills Competition for Higher Education Institutions

title: 2023 年中国人居环境设计学年奖
titleEn: 2023 China Habitat Environment Design Academic Year Award
